Troy (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $133,298,577Details
International Box Office $349,853,463
Worldwide Box Office $483,152,040
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$46,865,412 (35.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.84 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,411 opening theaters/3,411 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $256,723,182

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 14th, 2004 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 13th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
July 3rd, 2020 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: January 4th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for graphic violence and some sexuality/nudity
Running Time: 162 minutes
Plot point: Kidnap, Revenge, Sex Crimes, War
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: Ancient Greece
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Radiant Productions, Plan B Entertainment
Production Countries: United Kingdom, Malta, United States
Languages: English
